name: raydoom
title: RayDoom
description: Play classic DOOM rendered in ASCII art
author: saketh_chandra

commands.name: index
commands.title: Play DOOM
commands.description: Launch DOOM with episode and difficulty selection

commands.name: run-doom
commands.title: Quick Launch
commands.description: Start DOOM immediately with default settings

preferences.name: forwardBackwardDelay
preferences.title: Forward/Backward Delay (ms)
preferences.description: How long W and S keys stay pressed. Higher value = smoother movement, less key pressing needed. Default: 200ms

preferences.name: turnStrafeDelay
preferences.title: Turn/Strafe Delay (ms)
preferences.description: How long A, D, Q, E keys stay pressed. Default: 250ms

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
